paper.title: Effects of the usage of diatomite and waste marble powder as partial replacement of cement on the mechanical properties of concrete
paper.material_system: diatomite and waste marble powder cement replacement concrete

conditions.curing_method: lime saturated water after demoulding at 24 h

evidence.evidence_text: Concrete mixture table lists PC, diatomite, WMP, water, super-plasticizer, river sand, crushed sandstone and crushed stone amounts in kg/m3.
Mechanical properties table lists compressive strength at 7, 28 and 90 days in MPa.
Concrete specimens were cured in lime saturated water at 20 ± 2 C until testing; 7, 28 and 90 day compressive and flexural strengths were determined.
